title: STABILO swing cool Pastel - Highlighter - Pack of 6 - Assorted Colours
features: The STABILO Anti-Dry Out Technology allows an incredible 4 hour cap off time.
Europe's best selling pocket highlighter helps you highlighting important parts of your documents.
Expand your colours in your pencil case with the lovely STABILO swing cool Pastel colours in order to make your everyday life colourful.
Start highlighting and mind mapping with the high-quality STABILO water-based ink.
The wedged tip draws broad lines, highlights and underlines important parts of your documents and has line widths of 1mm and 4mm.
description: From the manufacturer STABILO swing cool Pastel Highlighter For all those on the move The STABILO swing cool is perfect for school and university with its matt finish and slim pocket sized design. It is available in twenty-two colours - eight bright florescent colours and fourteen beautiful delicate pastel shades. The STABILO swing cool can be left uncapped for up to four hours and has a handy clip for when you’re on the go its ready for whenever you need a highlighter to hand. Product features: 4 hours cap-off time Non-slip, matt finish grip zone Available in 8 fluorescent colours and 14 pastel colours 2 line widths: 1 + 4mm Water based ink Slim compact design 4 hour cap off time The STABILO Anti-Dry-Out Technology promises that the lid can be left off for up to 4 hours without drying out Two line widths The wedge tip of the STABILO swing cool enables area highlighting (4mm) as well as fine underlining (1mm) Slim compact design Perfect for on the go Available in Neon Swing cool pastel also comes in 8 fluorescent neon colours
